nodes.label: AI as backup for low-energy days
nodes.label_negative: Struggling through low-energy days without AI
nodes.grounding_span: if I'm not feeling great or don't have energy to think, which happens at least 1 day a week, I'll use AI in part for all of it

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: working collaboratively with anything more creative

nodes.label: AI as practical problem-solving guide for hands-on tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI requiring iterative collaboration for routine work
nodes.grounding_span: typically with cold emails I ask for something with specific perimeters and the first response I copy and paste and use

nodes.label: Authenticity of AI-generated content
nodes.grounding_span: I want it to feel personal. I don't ever want someone to view our company account and be able to tell it was AI

nodes.label: AI as aid requiring human direction
nodes.grounding_span: I think the AI needs me to operate it for these tasks so I don't actively consider it taking over my job

nodes.label: Concealing AI use from older bosses
nodes.label_negative: Openly using AI with boss approval
nodes.grounding_span: I don't make a show of using it in front of the owners, mostly because I want them to think I'm doing all of my work myself

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I want it to feel personal

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Every single time I don't have to write a cold email I feel satisfied

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: Every single time I don't have to write a cold email I feel satisfied

nodes.label: Preference for personal touch in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I want it to feel personal. I don't ever want someone to view our company account and be able to tell it was AI

nodes.label: Confidence in human creative superiority
nodes.grounding_span: I believe humans have a specific touch when it comes to storytelling that I don't believe AI could ever replicate

nodes.label: Caution about revealing AI use to bosses
nodes.grounding_span: I don't make a show of using it in front of the owners

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: working collaboratively with anything more creative... typically with cold emails I ask for something with specific perimeters and the first response I copy and paste and use

nodes.label: Energy-aware task allocation — using AI when low energy
